payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and visible toe-kick at the base; left edge of the door is cropped by the image border and the finish appears matte with minor scuffs and wear near the bottom — roughly 0.6 m from the camera.
